catalog_content:
Item Name: Muscle Milk Pro Series Protein Powder Supplement, Intense Vanilla, 2.54 Pound, 14 Servings, 50g Protein, 3g Sugar, 20 Vitamins & Minerals, NSF Certified for Sport, Workout Recovery, Packaging May Vary
Bullet Point 1: Contains one (1) 2.54 pound cannister (about 14 servings) of Muscle Milk Pro Series Protein Powder Supplement. Packaging may vary. Shaker bottle sold separately.
Bullet Point 2: HELPS SATISFY HUNGER AND BUILD MUSCLE – Muscle Milk Pro Series supplies your body with high quality protein to support post-workout recovery and muscle growth and maintenance. Try taking it to-go in a shaker bottle for energizing on-the-go nutrition.
Bullet Point 3: KEY FEATURES – Based on 1 serving, Muscle Milk Pro Series Protein Powder contains 50g high-quality protein, 3g sugar, and an excellent source of 20 vitamins and minerals.
Bullet Point 4: VERSATILE AND EASY-TO-MIX – Muscle Milk Pro Series dissolves easily in water; just mix 2 scoops into 10-16 fluid ounces of water using a shaker bottle. Shaker bottle sold separately.
Bullet Point 5: SCIENCE BEHIND PROTEIN – Muscle Milk Pro Series provides a blend of high-quality slow releasing and fast releasing proteins to help increase amino acid levels. These essential amino acids play a role in muscle growth and maintenance of muscle mass.
Bullet Point 6: TESTED FOR BANNED SUBSTANCES – Muscle Milk Protein Powders are NSF Certified for Sport. NSF screens for more than 270 substances banned by most major athletic organizations.
Bullet Point 7: Muscle Milk Pro Series Protein Powder Supplement, Intense Vanilla, 2.54 Pound, 14 Servings, 50g Protein, 3g Sugar, 20 Vitamins & Minerals, NSF Certified for Sport, Workout Recovery, Packaging May Vary
Bullet Point 8: These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Value: 40.7
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium-branded protein supplement positioned for fitness enthusiasts, with a strong emphasis on high protein content (50g per serving) and muscle recovery benefits. The 2.54 lb (1.15 kg) container, despite being 14 servings, suggests a mid-range unit price, supported by the specialized formulation and NSF certification for sports. Packaging design and 'Pro Series' branding imply a mid-to-high tier in the protein powder market, with added value from artificial vanilla flavoring and easy-mix convenience.

Bullet Point 2: Glico Pocky Matcha Green Tea Cream Covered Biscuit Sticks blend the distinct flavor of finely powdered green tea ("matcha") into a smooth green tea cream wrapped around a tasty, crispy cookie biscuit stick
Bullet Point 3: Featuring Pocky's signature "handle" at one end of the stick, Glico Pocky Matcha Green Tea Cream Covered Biscuit Sticks are described by many as a light and refreshing snack with a satisfying crunch
Bullet Point 4: A favorite amongst hard-core Pocky fans the world over, Pocky Matcha blends the distinct flavor of finely powdered green tea ("matcha") into a smooth green tea cream wrapped around a tasty, crispy cookie biscuit stick. Light and refreshing, it's the perfect combination of a delicate flavor with a satisfying crunch.
Bullet Point 5: The perfect balance of high-quality, matcha green tea cream and the crunch of the crispy cookie biscuit stick make it the perfect every-day snack. Pocky is all about sharing happiness with friends, family and co-workers. Next time open a box of Glico Pocky Matcha Green Tea Cream Covered Biscuit Sticks, pass it around, and watch the smiles and happiness spread
Product Description: Did you know that Pocky is the most popular chocolate covered biscuit in Japan? Matcha Pocky is made from expertly crafted biscuit dough that uses the highest quality flour, and green tea cream made from Japanese grown green tea to ensure the highest quality flavor. Combine these with an easy-to-handle stick that keeps the cream off of your hands, and you've got the ultimate in snacking heaven. With plenty of sticks in each box, Pocky is about sharing happiness with friends, family, co-workers--anyone, anytime, anywhere! Just open a box, pass it around, and watch the smiles and happiness spread.

product_name: Pocky Matcha Green Tea Cream Covered Biscuit Sticks
overall_summary: Mid-tier snack product positioned as a Japanese import with a unique flavor profile, leveraging matcha and green tea cream. The bundle deal (10 packs) suggests affordability and convenience for group sharing, aligning with its promotional messaging. Standard cardboard packaging and lack of premium claims indicate a mass-market appeal with a focus on cultural novelty rather than luxury positioning.
